Notes - Current Assets: All values are in $m. 2025 is not reported in the balance sheet.

1. Cash & Bank Balance is taken directly from the line ‘Cash and cash equivalents’ in the Consolidated Statement of Financial Position. 2. ‘Investments’ aggregates the ‘Other investments’ line under Current Assets; derivative financial instruments are treated as ‘Other Current Assets’ to avoid double‑counting, as they are not explicitly classified as short‑term investments in the source. 3. ‘Inventory’ maps to the ‘Inventories’ line. 4. ‘Receivables’ is the sum of ‘Trade and other receivables’ and ‘Income tax receivable’. 5. ‘Prepaid Expenses’ and ‘Loans & Advances’ are not disclosed in the current‑assets section and are therefore reported as zero. 6. ‘Other Current Assets’ includes only the ‘Derivative financial instruments’ line; ‘Assets held for sale’ is excluded because it is a separate classification and not part of the CMA current‑asset categories. 7. Total Current Assets are taken from the ‘Total current assets’ line in the source statement; the aggregated sub‑components sum exactly to this figure, confirming no double‑counting. 8. All numeric values are presented in plain digits (no commas) and retain the original sign and scale. 9. No note references were attached to the extracted amounts; any footnote references were omitted from the numeric values as per the instructions.
All current‑asset line items are taken directly from the Consolidated Statement of Financial Position.  No additional granularity was required for the RBI/IBA CMA mapping.

Notes - Non-Current Assets: 4. **Ambiguities Flagged** –
• *Intangible Assets* = Intangible Assets + Goodwill (Goodwill is treated as an intangible asset under the CMA framework).
• *Deferred Tax Assets* = Deferred Tax Assets.
3. **Mapping Assumptions** –
All values are in $m.
• The slight mismatch in 2024/2023 totals indicates a potential re‑classification that is not captured in the table; this requires confirmation from the auditor’s notes.
None
• *Fixed Assets (Net Block)* = Property, Plant & Equipment + Right‑of‑Use Assets.
• *Investments (Non‑Current)* = Investments in Associates & Joint Ventures + Other Investments + Derivative Financial Instruments.
• Right‑of‑Use Assets are combined with Property, Plant & Equipment to form Fixed Assets (Net Block).
$m
• Derivative Financial Instruments are treated as part of Investments (Non‑Current).
• *Other Non‑Current Assets* = Other Receivables.

1. **Aggregation Logic** – Each CMA attribute was populated by summing the relevant line items from the Non‑Current Assets section of the Consolidated Statement of Financial Position.  The mapping follows the RBI/IBA CMA nomenclature:
No non‑current asset line items were extracted for the purpose of this exercise.

2. **Year‑wise Discrepancies** – For 2024 and 2023 the sum of the mapped categories (76,192 and 76,192 respectively) exceeds the reported Total Non‑Current Assets (76,065) by 127 and 127 units.  This suggests that one or more line items may be double‑counted or that the source total excludes a small component (e.g., a minor re‑classification).  The 2022 figures reconcile exactly (73,890).  The discrepancy is flagged for manual review.

5. **Notes to the Auditor** – The auditor should verify the classification of Right‑of‑Use Assets and confirm whether any component of the Total Non‑Current Assets has been omitted or re‑classified in the source.
• *Capital Work‑in‑Progress* and *Loans & Advances* were not disclosed in the source and are therefore set to zero.
• Goodwill is included in Intangible Assets as per RBI/IBA CMA guidance.
• The source does not explicitly state whether Right‑of‑Use Assets are current or non‑current; they are treated as non‑current for consistency with the CMA format.

Notes - Current Liabilities: All values are in $m and are negative to reflect liability balances. 2025 is not reported in the balance sheet. 2024, 2023 and 2022 are presented in the order requested.
No current liability line items were extracted for the purpose of this exercise.
All current‑liability line items are taken directly from the Consolidated Statement of Financial Position.  No additional granularity was required for the RBI/IBA CMA mapping.

Notes - Non-Current Liabilities: All non‑current‑liability line items are taken directly from the Consolidated Statement of Financial Position.  No additional granularity was required for the RBI/IBA CMA mapping.
No non‑current liability line items were extracted for the purpose of this exercise.

Long‑Term Borrowings = Interest‑bearing loans & borrowings + Lease liabilities; Provisions (Non‑Current) = Provisions + Retirement benefit obligations; Other Non‑Current Liabilities = Derivative financial instruments + Income tax payable + Other payables. All figures are taken from the Consolidated Statement of Financial Position and are presented as negative values to reflect liability balances. No ambiguities were flagged.

Notes - Equity: All equity line items are taken directly from the Consolidated Statement of Financial Position.  No additional granularity was required for the RBI/IBA CMA mapping.
No equity line items were extracted for the purpose of this exercise.
